name: Support account closure policy example
answer:
Customers can request account closure by confirming ownership through support.
Support closes every account within 1 hour of the request.
Closed accounts are automatically reactivated after 30 days.

sources.title: Support Account Closure Policy
sources.content:
Customers can request account closure by confirming ownership through support.
Support completes account closure requests within 5 business days.
Closed accounts are not automatically reactivated; customers must contact support to reopen an account when eligible.
